title: 食べないのは悪手だよ

text_block_list.text:
On the way to lunch with Gold City, we meet
Yukino Bijin in the hallway.
Grrrumble!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Gosh, I'm starv'n...
choice_data_list: That was quite a stomach growl.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, haven't you had lunch?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Well, you see... The other day, I went to a sweets
buffet with a friend...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
After we finished, my friend said she ate a bit too
much, so she started this diet.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Then I noticed my skirt was feeling a little tight,
so I figured I should join her... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I see. But that doesn't mean you should skip
meals.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
In fact, you came just at the right time, Yukino.
Follow me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So, are there any types of food you don't like?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Not particularly, but... um, City? This is the
cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Trainer and I were just about to eat
lunch, so you should join us too.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Eat a balanced meal and you'll be fine. First up,
you should include some fiber-rich vegetables...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and soy products are good too. Do you like
tofu and natto?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, I like 'em both!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's grilled fish on today's menu. Do you
like fish?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I love fish!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
But, um, do you really think I should be eating
this?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. Oh, you should eat your vegetables first.
It'll slow down the digestion and absorption
process.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You know, skipping meals tends to backfire—you
end up eating even more later to compensate for
the lack of energy.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Plus, if you don't get enough nutrients, it's going
to affect your skin too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Your skin is so beautiful and smooth, it would be
a shame if you started breaking out. Got it?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! I-I'll do m'best!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm gonna eat well as I can!

I'm always impressed by the beauty perspective
that Gold City brings.

Maybe she can help me out with some of my own
beauty troubles...
choice_data_list:
You know... I'm actually trying to build more
muscle...
Do you know what I can eat to feel full?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? You care about that kind of thing too?
choice_data_list: Well, I want to look good for those interviews!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I see. Let me think...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay—how's this for an idea? Just for today, I'll
be your trainer and you can be the trainee.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Now give me ten more! Don't give up—you got
this!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Strengthening the lats will improve your posture,
which, of course, will make you look better in
photos.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But you know all that already. You're a trainer
after all.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Guess I can just watch, then.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...This is so weird. A trainer being trained by an
Umamusume.

Over the following months, Gold City helps me
stick to the regimen until I start to see results.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'd like to know that too!
choice_data_list: I tend to get kind of hungry really often...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, my usual tactic is to snack on nuts if I get
hungry...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But tell you what—I'll make a list to give both of
you later. I got it from an experienced model
when I was first starting out.
choice_data_list: A diet list for professional models?!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Whoooa, but isn't that classified information?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's not that special. You can find the information
on the list just about anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Since I don't have the list to give you both now...
well, I'll just have to pick your foods for you.

Thanks to the very satisfying menu she served me,
I manage to get my afternoon's work done
smoothly.
